description: Phoenix AI Agent Registry — master index of all agents

agents.name: Project Manager
agents.mission: Prioritize backlog, detect blockers, maintain roadmap, and ensure quality gates are met before any task is marked complete.
runbook: Read TASK_REGISTER.md and identify next ready task
Update NEXT_TASK.md with recommended next task

agents.name: Solution Architect
agents.mission: Design the architecture and implementation plan for each feature request, ensuring alignment with the existing system architecture.
runbook: Generate implementation plan with file tree

agents.name: Repository Engineer
agents.mission: Maintain repository health, enforce project standards, and ensure the monorepo structure, tooling, and configuration remain consistent and buildable.
runbook: Run full validation suite (typecheck, lint, test, build, format)
Check dependency drift and update if needed
Fix any build or tooling issues

agents.name: UI Engineer
agents.mission: Build and maintain the design system and UI components in 02-packages/ui, ensuring they are accessible, responsive, themeable, and production-ready.
runbook: Create types, constants, component, tests, stories, README

agents.name: API Engineer
agents.mission: Design and implement backend APIs, services, and serverless functions that are secure, performant, and well-documented.
runbook: Read API requirements and existing service patterns

agents.name: Test Engineer
agents.mission: Ensure comprehensive test coverage across all packages, writing tests that catch regressions and verify behavior without duplicating implementation logic.
runbook: Write tests covering: render, props, variants, states, events, edge cases

agents.name: Documentation Engineer
agents.mission: Create and maintain comprehensive documentation that enables developers to understand, use, and contribute to the Phoenix platform.
runbook: Write clear docs with active voice and code examples

agents.name: Release Manager
agents.mission: Manage the release process from code freeze through deployment, ensuring versioning, changelog generation, and release artifacts are correct.
runbook: Verify all milestone tasks are COMPLETED
